channel.title: Deep Learning on Welcome to my page!
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Learning on Welcome to my page!

item.title: Deep Learning Nanodegree Foundation (Udacity)
item.description: The goal for this project was to classify images from hotels into one of 8 classes. I implemented a Convolutional Neural Network using “keras” library (Deep Learning library for Theano and TensorFlow) to solve the classification problem including more than 80000 training examples with somewhat noisy ground truth labels and more than 20000 unlabeled testing images.

item.title: Deep Learning by Google Brain (Udacity)
item.description: Implemented the deep learning techniques using Google Tensorflow that cover deep neural networks with a fully connected network using SGD and ReLUs; Regularization with a multi-layer neural network using ReLUs, L2-regularization, and dropout, to prevent overfitting; Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with learning rate decay and dropout; and Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) for text and sequences with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks.

item.title: Deep Learning (Class project)
item.description: The goal for this project was to classify images from hotels into one of 8 classes. I implemented a Convolutional Neural Network using “keras” library (Deep Learning library for Theano and TensorFlow) to solve the classification problem including more than 80000 training examples with somewhat noisy ground truth labels and more than 20000 unlabeled testing images.
